profiles.name: baseline
profiles.format_contract_template: Return the final answer in FINAL(...) with no extra text.
profiles.depth_strategy_template: Use recursive decomposition when needed, otherwise answer directly.

profiles.name: format_strict
profiles.format_contract_template: STRICT OUTPUT CONTRACT: one line FINAL(<answer>); no prose, no code blocks, no tool traces.

profiles.name: depth_soft
profiles.format_contract_template: Return only FINAL(<answer>) in the final response.
profiles.depth_strategy_template: Decompose into subproblems and call llm_query for independent/high-complexity parts before FINAL(...).

profiles.name: depth_strict
profiles.format_contract_template: Return only FINAL(<answer>) in the final response.
profiles.depth_strategy_template: You must use recursive llm_query calls and verify sub-results before FINAL(...).

profiles.name: format_plus_depth
profiles.format_contract_template: STRICT OUTPUT CONTRACT: exactly FINAL(<answer>) on one line; no markdown, no repl blocks, no scratchpad.
profiles.depth_strategy_template: Break task into 2-4 subproblems, use llm_query for hard parts, merge, verify, then FINAL(...).
